titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Council of Masters, Yale University, Meeting Minutes
Council of Masters, Yale University, Meeting Minutes
titlestmt.author: compiled by Mary Caldera and Kathryn Dana

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Thursday September 3, 2020 at 09:58

did.unittitle: Council of Masters, Yale University, meeting minutes
did.abstract: The records consist of minutes and associated files of the monthly Yale Council of Masters meetings.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 13-A (YRG 13-A), Records of the Yale Council of Masters.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: The materials were transferred from the Office of the Council of Masters, 1987-2005.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: While this collection as a whole is available for research, parts of it may be restricted due to law, university policy or fragility. Any restricted material will be noted as such.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Council of Masters, Yale University, Minutes of Meetings (RU 299), Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

relatedmaterial.head: Associated Materials
relatedmaterial.p: Records of the Council of Masters (RU 295).

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: The Council of Masters was established in 1932, the year the first masters were appointed. The Council makes recommendations to the University President in matters of policy concerning the residential colleges. It also serves as the committee of control in the affairs concerning two or more residential colleges. The Council consists of the masters of the residential colleges. Ex officio members include the University President, Provost Dean of Yale College, Associate Dean of Yale College and Associate Dean for Student Affairs.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The records consist of minutes and associated files of the monthly Yale Council of Masters meetings.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: The title "Master" for chief executive officers of residential colleges was changed to "Head of College" in April of 2016.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The records contain minutes and material related to the monthly Council of Masters meetings, 1932-2005. Most records from 1932-1992 include associated meeting files, but records from 1993-2005 contain only minutes and the semiannual student census summaries. Associated files may include votes and agreements, memoranda, correspondence with Yale and New Haven administrators, meeting agendas, and requests for Fellows appointments.

The main content of the minutes themselves concerns the naming and allocation of Fellows to the residential colleges. Other matters mentioned in the minutes include the residential college libraries; visiting hours for women (pre-1969); the coat and tie rule in dining halls; policies for students returning from war; and distribution of Council of Masters funds to student organizations.
Indices to the meeting minutes for the years 1935-1965 can be found in Box 1. The bound volumes for the years 1932-1943 also contain indices.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Minutes are restricted until January 1, 2017 as established by Yale Corporation regulations.
